description: Implement ARIA roles and keyboard support for the course catalog and enrollment flow to enable navigation for visually impaired users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a visually impaired user WHEN they navigate the course catalog THEN they can access all course cards and complete the enrollment flow using a screen reader.

description: Add closed captions, transcripts, and keyboard controls to the video player to enhance accessibility for deaf, hard-of-hearing, and motor-impaired users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with hearing impairment WHEN they access a video THEN they can view captions and use keyboard controls to navigate the video.

description: Revise UI components to meet WCAG AA contrast ratios across all text elements to ensure readability for users with visual impairments.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with visual impairments WHEN they view the UI THEN all text elements have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for normal text.

description: Make quiz and assessment forms accessible to assistive technologies by using semantic HTML elements and providing text descriptions for error messages.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user using a screen reader WHEN they complete a quiz THEN they can navigate all questions and receive error messages with text descriptions.

description: Set up monitoring for accessibility compliance metrics to track progress and ensure ongoing adherence to WCAG standards.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place WHEN a critical WCAG violation occurs THEN alerts are generated for immediate action.

description: Ensure all interactive components across the platform are operable via keyboard to support motor-impaired users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a motor-impaired user WHEN they navigate the platform THEN they can access all interactive components using only the keyboard.

description: Ensure that all error messages are conveyed through both color and text descriptions to support users with visual impairments.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user encounters an error WHEN they view the message THEN it includes both color and text descriptions.

description: Conduct a full accessibility audit, create a Voluntary Product Accessibility Template (VPAT), and publish an accessibility statement to meet compliance requirements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a completed accessibility audit WHEN the VPAT is created THEN it accurately reflects the platform's compliance with WCAG 2.1 AA standards.

description: Implement a mechanism to gather user feedback specifically on accessibility features to inform future improvements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the feedback form WHEN they submit feedback THEN it is recorded and categorized for analysis.

description: Conduct A/B tests on different accessibility features to measure their impact on task completion rates for users with disabilities.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN two versions of an accessibility feature WHEN users complete tasks THEN the completion rates are compared to determine effectiveness.

description: Update documentation to reflect new accessibility features and compliance efforts, ensuring users are informed of changes.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the documentation is updated WHEN users access it THEN they can find clear information about accessibility features and compliance.
